pages.title: 力: low-tier counter
pages.text: Position: turn damage taken into short-term attack. 力 is the early version of the retaliation playstyle.$(br2)It gives offense, not huge defense, so pair it with 心 or 忍.

pages.title: 力 tiers
pages.text: Wood 5m, every 1 final damage gives +0.5% attack, cap +20%$(br)Stone 6m, cap +30%$(br)Copper 8m, cap +40%$(br)Iron 10m, cap +50%$(br)Gold 5m, cap +60%$(br)Diamond 10m, cap +60%, small knockback every 10 hits$(br)Netherite 10m, steadier knockback

pages.title: 怒: high pressure
pages.text: Position: diamond-tier combat engine. 怒 is strong, but capped. Wood, stone, and copper cannot cast it reliably; iron/gold tell you to use diamond.

pages.title: 怒 tiers
pages.text: Diamond 10m: every 1 final damage gives +1% damage reduction, cap 65%; every 5 damage gives +5% attack, cap +125%; every 10 entity hits releases a shockwave.$(br2)Netherite 10m: reduction cap 70%, attack cap +150%, steadier shockwave.

pages.title: 怒 reset
pages.text: The shockwave has radius 4, pushes enemies away, and deals small magic damage.$(br2)When 怒 expires, death/logout/world switch clears reduction, attack gain, and counters. Recasting 怒 also resets reduction and attack gain.
